dominant_themes: semiconductor equipment and strategic supply chain

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Direct core exposure to GPUs, CPUs, and data-center compute makes it one of the clearest AI infrastructure names in the group.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: AI accelerator share, supply availability, hyperscaler demand, and valuation need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Custom silicon, networking, and data-center semiconductor exposure sit directly in the AI infrastructure bottleneck.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: AI revenue concentration, customer timing, margin trajectory, and valuation need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Memory bandwidth and capacity are central AI infrastructure constraints, giving this candidate a strong structural fit.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Memory pricing, high-bandwidth memory share, capex cycle, and valuation need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Grid construction is a direct power-infrastructure bottleneck for electrification, data centers, and industrial buildout.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Project timing, labor cost, backlog quality, and valuation after the move need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Foundry capacity connects directly to strategic chip supply chains and government-supported manufacturing priorities.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Technology node mix, utilization, subsidy impact, and end-market exposure need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: AI server and systems integration exposure gives it direct leverage to compute deployment and infrastructure buildout.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Customer concentration, backlog visibility, margin durability, and order timing need current review.

candidates_for_final.company: MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings Inc. Common Stock
candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: RF and high-performance semiconductor exposure is relevant to data-center networking, defense, and communications infrastructure.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Valuation, order trends, defense and data-center mix, and margin quality need current review.

candidates_for_final.company: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Ordinary Shares (Ireland)

candidates_for_final.main_risk: Storage-cycle pricing, capacity demand, product mix, and valuation need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Launch and space-systems exposure gives it direct relevance to defense, sovereign space capacity, and communications infrastructure.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Launch cadence, contract mix, profitability path, and valuation need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Digital infrastructure and data-center exposure align directly with AI compute capacity demand.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Financing, customer contracts, project execution, and data-center economics need current review.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Power conversion components are a direct picks-and-shovels exposure to AI servers, data centers, and strategic electronics.
candidates_for_final.main_risk: Customer concentration, competitive position, and current data-center demand exposure need verification.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Servers, storage, networking, and enterprise infrastructure make it a broad AI hardware and platform candidate.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Semiconductor equipment exposure fits advanced chip capacity and strategic manufacturing investment.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Large-scale processor, foundry, and domestic manufacturing exposure fit both AI infrastructure and strategic supply-chain priorities.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Optical communications hardware is directly tied to AI data-center bandwidth and network scaling.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Connectivity semiconductor exposure can link to data-center networking and broader infrastructure buildouts.

candidates_for_final.why_forwarded: Physical infrastructure construction fits fiscal buildout, industrial reshoring, and data-center support themes.

candidates_for_final.company: Fluence Energy Inc. Class A Common Stock

candidates_for_final.company: Bloom Energy Corporation Class A Common Stock

candidates_for_final.company: USA Rare Earth Inc. Class A Common Stock

rejected_patterns: biotechnology and healthcare momentum outside the target themes
consumer services, media, travel, restaurants, and specialty retail
finance names without confirmed digital-asset infrastructure or hard-asset exposure
generic real estate, leasing, and industrial exposure without direct strategic infrastructure linkage
speculative sensors, autonomy, and quantum names without near-term infrastructure demand proof
